_comment: Fast engine-only mutation loop. engine.js mutants are killed ONLY by the three harnesses that execute runPass (engine-pass, engine-legacy-snapshots, engine-rigor, hypotheticals) - verified no other test imports emigration-engine.js - so the command runner reruns just those instead of the full 108-test suite: ~seconds/mutant instead of ~16s. Use `npm run mutation:engine`. The full 5-module run remains `npm run mutation`.
